recommendations.title: Begotten
recommendations.overview: Begotten is the creation myth brought to life, the story of no less than the violent death of God and the (re)birth of nature on a barren earth.

recommendations.title: Ghostwatch

recommendations.title: Religulous

recommendations.title: The Eyes of My Mother
recommendations.overview: A young, lonely woman is consumed by her deepest and darkest desires after tragedy strikes her quiet country life.

recommendations.title: The Devil Conspiracy
recommendations.overview: A powerful biotech company has breakthrough technology allowing them to clone history’s most influential people with just a few fragments of DNA. Behind this company is a cabal of Satanists that steals the shroud of Christ, putting them in possession

recommendations.title: Best Worst Movie
recommendations.overview: A look at the making of the film Troll 2 (1990) and its journey from being crowned the "worst film of all time" to a cherished cult classic.

recommendations.title: Grave Encounters 2
recommendations.overview: Tortured by the ghosts of the demonized insane asylum that killed the crew of GRAVE ENCOUNTERS, film students fight to escape death as their own paranormal investigation goes terribly wrong in this horrifying sequel.

recommendations.title: Sly
recommendations.overview: His love of film began as an escape from a rocky childhood. From underdog to Hollywood legend, Sylvester Stallone tells his story in this documentary.

recommendations.title: Food, Inc.
